title: agrostis subpatens
intro: Agrostis subpatens, also known as bentgrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis subpatens include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Agrostis subpatens can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
